case_title: CHRIS LAGRAND VS. GINA CENTONI et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,975.00 FILED BY LAGRAND, CHRIS AS TO DEFENDANT CENTONI, GINA - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC ALIOTO, MICHAEL - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT CENTONI, GINA - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC ALIOTO, MICHAEL - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CENTONI, GINA - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC ALIOTO, MICHAEL - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LAGRAND, CHRIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED OCT-02-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIOTO, MICHAEL - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAGRAND, CHRIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENTONI, GINA - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC ALIOTO, MICHAEL - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC $975.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,125.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CENTONI, GINA - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC ALIOTO, MICHAEL - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED OCT-02-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIOTO, MICHAEL - ALIOTO CENTONI RESTORATION  & DEVELOPMENT LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
